author: Ubisoft YouTube
text:
For Honor: Content of the Week - 21 May
Wait for it...

The Effect Thunderous Rage, Execution Mjolnir's Flight and Outfit Spirit of the Wolf are available until June 4th!
Highlander is free for a limited time, and on sale as well! We're also releasing a Unique Execution for that Hero.

author: Ubisoft YouTube
text:
For Honor: Content Of The Week - May 21
The Effect Thunderous Rage, Execution Mjolnir's Flight and Outfit Spirit of the Wolf are available until June 4th!

Highlander is free for a limited time, and on sale as well! We're also releasing a Unique Execution for that Hero.

About For Honor:
Carve a path of destruction through the battlefield fighting for guts, glory, and survival in For Honor. Enter the chaos of a raging war as a Hero from some of the greatest warrior legacies ever known. For Honor is a fast-paced and immersive experience, mixing skill with visceral, never-before-seen melee combat.

Enjoy incredible seasonal content, engaging campaign and thrilling multiplayer with friends online, or solo against AI.

#Ubisoft #ForHonor  

Learn more about Ubisoft: www.ubisoftgroup.com

author: Ubisoft YouTube
text:
Skull and Bones - Year 3 Overview
Year 3 of Skull and Bones launches May 12 with a renewed focus on naval combat, deeper progression, and greater build freedom. 

 Season 1 introduces the powerful Galleon, a revamped Seasonal Mastery system, and tougher challenges with new World Tiers. 

Throughout the year, new ships, expanded customization, evolving Faction Wars, and quality-of-life improvements will give Captains more ways to build, fight, and dominate the seas. 

About Skull and Bones:
Enter the perilous world of Skull and BonesTM, where you play by your own rules to rise from a nobody to become the most fearsome pirate kingpin. Craft a variety of unique ships, forge unlikely alliances, and take part in thrilling naval battles as you overcome the odds and bring mayhem on the seas. Be part of an immersive world that introduces new challenges and features every season. 

#Ubisoft #SkullandBones 

Learn more about Ubisoft: www.ubisoftgroup.com

© Ubisoft Entertainment. All Rights Reserved. Ubisoft and the Ubisoft logo are registered trademarks in the US and/or other countries.
